---
title: "Migration, Crime and Education Analytics Project"
---

## Project Overview

This project analyzes the relationship between migration, crime statistics, and education levels across Turkish provinces. AAAAAAAAA

The study focuses on three main questions:

1.  How does migration change across provinces?
2.  Is there a relationship between crime counts and migration?
3.  How are education levels related to crime indicators?

## Main Methods

-   Data cleaning and transformation
-   Correlation analysis
-   Linear regression
-   Net migration analysis
-   Time series forecasting with ARIMA/SARIMA
-   Heatmap visualization for education and crime indicators

## Tools Used

-   R
-   dplyr
-   tidyr
-   ggplot2
-   forecast
-   Quarto
